method: Replace UCB1 exploit term (lessons/n) with value_density (merge_rate * (1 + log1p(lessons))). Compare top-10 dispatch quality before vs after.

change.rationale: F-STR1 S379: value_density had rho=0.792 with domain productivity. lessons/n was neutral (rho=-0.14 in UCB1 policy backtest).

tautology_check.reason: exploit term IS quality_score formula — rho=1.0 is definitional, not empirical
tautology_check.prospective_test_needed: Track L/lane rate under new regime over next 10 sessions

conclusions: Value-density exploit replaces 3 zero/low-quality domains in top-10 with historically productive ones
UCB1 exploration coverage preserved (Gini 0.524, all 36 domains visited)
Merge-rate signal was missing from old exploit — domains with 100% abandon rate scored same as unvisited
True validation requires prospective tracking (next 10+ sessions)
